CVE-2021-21783.title: A code execution vulnerability exists in the WS-Addressing plugin ...
CVE-2021-21783.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the WS-Addressing plugin functionality of Genivia gSOAP 2.8.107. A specially crafted SOAP request can lead to remote code execution. An attacker can send an HTTP request to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2024-4227.title: In Genivia gSOAP with a specific configuration an unauthenticated ...
CVE-2024-4227.description: In Genivia gSOAP with a specific configuration an unauthenticated remote attacker can generate a high CPU load when forcing to parse an XML having duplicate ID attributes which can lead to a DoS.
